# 在这里输入最长边

## 注意不要输入太高，后面会放大两倍出视频的。

subtitle，pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly，Low resolution, blurriness, noise, distortion, warping, twisting, extra limbs, deformed fingers, facial distortion, strange expressions, uneven skin tone, chaotic lighting, fragmented image, scene transitions, hard cuts, abrupt scene changes, stuttering animation, clipping, overlapping, text watermarks, logos, ugly, rough, poor rendering, dirty colors, cluttered backgrounds, extra characters, extra objects, motion blur, flickering, overexposure, underexposure, inconsistent art style.subtitle，pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly, subtitles, captions, on-screen text, written text, letters, words, Chinese characters, English text, random text, garbled text, watermark, logo, title overlay, lower third text, UI text, interface text

# 根据你的提示词输入大概的时长

## 注意我测试过30秒内问题不大，一般用5/8/10/15这几种时长。

一位丰腴女子身着浅蓝与米白渐变的精致汉服，衣袂飘逸，黑发梳成古风发髻并点缀蓝玉发饰，立于黄昏海边的沙滩礁石之上，背景是浅蓝海面与远山。女子眼神凌厉，双手持剑，剑刃泛着幽蓝寒光，她开口说话铿锵有力愤怒地说出台词：何方妖孽，吃我一剑。双臂立马快速举起手中的剑，瞬间发力快速向前砍去，剑的光波划过空气时迸发出流动的蓝色法术光效与粒子剑气。色调清冷偏黄昏感，特效通透不刺眼，整体氛围侠气凛然又充满东方奇幻感。

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles
